headline: Major Banks Poised for Strong Quarterly Results, Outlook, Deutsche Bank Says
summary: US large-cap banks are expected to report strong second-quarter earnings and issue upbeat guidance,

headline: U.S. Bank and DAT: Truck freight rates accelerate
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, June 29, 2026--The latest quarterly U.S. Bank Freight Payment Index – Rates Edition showed truck freight rates rising considerably in April and May.
